case_title: ERNESTO AMILCAR ALVAREZ VS. JESSICA ARAUJO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ERNESTO AMILCAR ALVAREZ IS NOT PRESENT WHO WOULD HAVE BEEN ASSISTED BY MANTI HENRIQUEZ COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE JESSICA ARRUJO BY DEFENDANT ASSISTED BY DANIEL NAVARRO COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER NOVEMBER 16, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. D. 506 TO ALLOW FOR SPANISH INTERPERTERS FOR PLAINTFF AND DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2020 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETERS FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDNAT TO NOV-16-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ERNESTO AMILCAR ALVAREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JESSICA ARAUJO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE:NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,547.00 FILED BY ALVAREZ, ERNESTO AMILCAR AS TO DEFENDANT ARAUJO, JESSICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION, SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2020 AT 8:30 AM IS TO BE HEARD AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (M. JONES)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED JUL-27-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARAUJO, JESSICA
